## Probation Data ### Probation_DRC Program Referral The WV Probation DRC Program Referral dataset contains variables related to probation and day report center program referrals across counties in WV. The data spans from 2013 to 2023. The dataset has no missing values. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ### Probation_OCMS Financial Assessment The WV Probation OCMS Financial Assessment dataset contains variables related to the financial assessments conducted for probation cases across counties in West Virginia. The data spans from 2013 to 2023. An interesting aspect of the data is that the most common account type recorded is "Substance Screening Fees," which accounts for 35.9% of all entries (88,478 out of 246,367 total assessments). The dataset has no missing values. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
